Our Story

Where Stone Becomes Soul

At Zubia Industry, we believe that a handcrafted object carries the spirit of the maker. Every chisel stroke, every polished surface, every carved detail is an act of devotion — to the craft, and to you.

From sacred mandirs that honour your home's sanctity, to fountains that transform a garden into a haven, we work with the finest natural stone and materials to deliver pieces that endure generations.

We accept custom orders and work directly with clients to ensure each creation is uniquely yours.
